title: Dengue, Heat, And Rainfall Risk In Viet Nam
summary: Build a verified workflow for assessing where climate, water infrastructure, mobility, and dengue surveillance signals may support earlier district-level dengue risk review in Viet Nam.
why_it_matters: Dengue is climate-sensitive, operationally local, and easy to overstate. A useful contribution must separate evidence-backed risk review from unreviewed public-health advice.

success_metrics.target: Every accepted claim links to a dated evidence record with method and limitations.
success_metrics.validation_method: Run schema validation and reviewer spot-checks against evidence.json and evidence.md.

success_metrics.target: No alert, threshold, or intervention recommendation is merged without review and replication.
success_metrics.validation_method: Check task status, review records, and safety flags before accepting outputs.md updates.

success_metrics.target: Candidate analyses preserve district-level grain whenever source data permits it.
success_metrics.validation_method: Review reproducibility steps and confirm aggregation choices in pull requests.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review for operational claims, and replication for quantitative outputs.
